title: How to properly create a working bidir pad for use with verilator.

features.name: procedural continuous assignment to inout port
features.description: Code should include a procedural continuous assignment (always block) driving an inout port with a ternary operator for high-impedance state

features.name: inout port propagation through module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include an inout port on a submodule that is connected to an inout port on a parent module, where the parent port is forced from C++

features.name: dpi_c_exported_task_accessing_bidir_signal
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C exported task that reads bidirectional port state and enable signals
